---
title: "Verification: Remove 15%-significant-markers threshold from QTL interval definition"
date: 2026-04-24
categories: [verification]
status: complete
branch: "fix/remove-n-sigmarkers-thresh"
pr: 0
---

`check_significant_proportion()` has been removed from `analyze_mapping()` in `R/analysis.R`. Previously, when more than 15% of GWA markers were significant, the function short-circuited and returned all-NA interval columns (`startPOS`, `peakPOS`, `endPOS`, `peak_id`, `interval_size`). Now `analyze_mapping()` always proceeds through `group_markers_to_intervals()` and `define_confidence_intervals()` regardless of significant-marker proportion. New unit tests in `tests/testthat/test-analyze_mapping.R` cover all sub-functions and regression scenarios.

---

## Summary Checklist

| \# | Step | Environment | Pass criterion | Result |
|---|------|-------------|---------------|--------|
| 0 | `NXF_VER=24.10.5` pinned | local | `nextflow -version` shows 24.10.x | [X] |
| 1a | stub-run `test` | local | exits 0, no wiring errors | [X] |
| 1b | stub-run `test,docker` | local | exits 0 | [X] |
| 1c | stub-run `test_variable` | local | exits 0 | [X] |
| 2 | unit tests | local | 0 failures in `test-analyze_mapping.R` | [X] |
| 3 | integration `test` | local | all tests pass | [ ] |

---

## 0. Prerequisites

```bash
export NXF_VER=24.10.5
nextflow -version   # must show 24.10.x
```

::: {.callout-note collapse="true" title="Output"}
``` text

      N E X T F L O W
      version 24.10.5 build 5935
      created 04-03-2025 17:55 UTC (11:55 CDT)
      cite doi:10.1038/nbt.3820
      http://nextflow.io
```
:::

---

## 1. Stub-runs (local)

Confirm Nextflow can resolve every `input:` / `output:` declaration before installing containers or generating pipeline data. The guard removal is pure R logic inside a process — no channel wiring changed — but stub-runs rule out accidental breakage.

### 1a. Fixed architecture (`test`)

```bash
export NXF_VER=24.10.5
nextflow run main.nf -profile test -stub-run
```

**Pass criterion:** exits 0, no `Missing output file` or `No such variable` errors.

::: {.callout-note collapse="true" title="Output"}
``` text
    Pipeline execution summary
    ---------------------------
    Completed at: 2026-04-24T15:08:55.965182-05:00
    Duration    : 4.1s
    Success     : true
    workDir     : /Users/ryanmckeown/Desktop/remove-n-sigmarkers-thresh/work
    exit status : 0
    Error report: -
    Git info: null - null [null]
```
:::

### 1b. Fixed architecture with Docker (`test,docker`)

```bash
export NXF_VER=24.10.5
nextflow run main.nf -profile test,docker -stub-run
```

**Pass criterion:** same as 1a.

::: {.callout-note collapse="true" title="Output"}
``` text
    Completed at: 2026-04-24T15:13:37.588870-05:00
    Duration    : 34.4s
    Success     : true
    workDir     : /Users/ryanmckeown/Desktop/remove-n-sigmarkers-thresh/work
    exit status : 0
    Error report: -
    Git info: null - null [null]
```
:::

### 1c. Variable architecture (`test_variable`)

```bash
export NXF_VER=24.10.5
nextflow run main.nf -profile test_variable -stub-run
```

**Pass criterion:** exits 0 across all combinations in the cartesian product.

::: {.callout-note collapse="true" title="Output"}
``` text
   Pipeline execution summary
    ---------------------------
    Completed at: 2026-04-24T15:27:11.527021-05:00
    Duration    : 39.7s
    Success     : true
    workDir     : /Users/ryanmckeown/Desktop/remove-n-sigmarkers-thresh/work
    exit status : 0
    Error report: -
    Git info: null - null [null]
```
:::

---

## 2. Unit Tests

Primary behavioral verification — runs entirely without pipeline data.

`test-analyze_mapping.R` (25+ tests) covers `flag_significant_markers()`, `group_markers_to_intervals()`, `define_confidence_intervals()`, and `analyze_mapping()`, including regression tests specifically for the removed guard:

- `analyze_mapping returns intervals when >15% of markers are significant [regression]` — 50% significant, would have returned all-NA before the fix
- `analyze_mapping returns intervals when 100% of markers are significant [regression]` — all markers significant
- `analyze_mapping returns all-NA intervals when no markers are significant [unchanged]` — 0% significant, expected all-NA
- `analyze_mapping defines intervals when <15% of markers are significant [unchanged]` — 5% significant, expected interval

```bash
Rscript tests/run_tests.R
```

**Pass criterion:** 0 failures. Integration tests auto-skip when `TEST_DB_DIR` is not set.

::: {.callout-note collapse="true" title="Output"}
``` text
analyze_mapping: ...................................................
assessment_cross_validation: SSSSSSSSSSSS
cross_validation: SSSSSSSSS
cv_pool: SSSSSSSS
db_structure: SSSSSSSSSSSSSSSSSSSSSSSSSSSS

══ Skipped ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
1. generate_mapping_id() is deterministic across invocations (test-assessment_cross_validation.R:199:3) - Reason: TEST_LEGACY_ASSESSMENT not set or file does not exist

2. both assessment output files exist and are non-empty (test-assessment_cross_validation.R:257:3) - Reason: TEST_LEGACY_ASSESSMENT not set or file does not exist

3. per-mapping detection concordance is 1.0 for all mappings (test-assessment_cross_validation.R:277:3) - Reason: TEST_LEGACY_ASSESSMENT not set or file does not exist

4. per-mapping designation concordance is 1.0 for all mappings (test-assessment_cross_validation.R:307:3) - Reason: TEST_LEGACY_ASSESSMENT not set or file does not exist

5. per-mapping interval Jaccard concordance is 1.0 for all mappings (test-assessment_cross_validation.R:342:3) - Reason: TEST_LEGACY_ASSESSMENT not set or file does not exist

6. Simulated.QTL.VarExp is populated in DB assessment output (test-assessment_cross_validation.R:410:3) - Reason: TEST_LEGACY_ASSESSMENT not set or file does not exist

7. DB assessment output has all expected columns from format_assessment_tsv() (test-assessment_cross_validation.R:423:3) - Reason: TEST_LEGACY_ASSESSMENT not set or file does not exist

8. calculate_simrep_performance() runs without error on real assessment data (test-assessment_cross_validation.R:443:3) - Reason: TEST_LEGACY_ASSESSMENT not set or file does not exist

9. designate_qtl() produces only valid categories on real data (test-assessment_cross_validation.R:466:3) - Reason: TEST_LEGACY_ASSESSMENT not set or file does not exist

10. concordance holds for each population independently (multi-species guard) (test-assessment_cross_validation.R:494:3) - Reason: TEST_LEGACY_ASSESSMENT not set or file does not exist

11. QTL chromosome names are consistent between DB and legacy paths (test-assessment_cross_validation.R:526:3) - Reason: TEST_LEGACY_ASSESSMENT not set or file does not exist

12. Simulated.QTL.VarExp is concordant between DB and legacy paths (test-assessment_cross_validation.R:555:3) - Reason: TEST_LEGACY_ASSESSMENT not set or file does not exist

13. DB mapping P and BETA values match raw GWA source files (test-cross_validation.R:84:3) - Reason: TEST_DB_DIR not set or directory does not exist

14. DB SE values match raw GWA source files (test-cross_validation.R:150:3) - Reason: TEST_DB_DIR not set or directory does not exist

15. DB AF1 values match raw GWA source files (test-cross_validation.R:188:3) - Reason: TEST_DB_DIR not set or directory does not exist

16. EIGEN threshold from DB matches pipeline EIGEN value (test-cross_validation.R:227:3) - Reason: TEST_DB_DIR not set or directory does not exist

17. read_raw_gwa_file() returns normalized columns for inbred and loco formats (test-cross_validation.R:261:3) - Reason: TEST_DB_DIR not set or directory does not exist

18. query_by_mapping_id() returns non-empty result for every mapping_id in metadata (test-cross_validation.R:312:3) - Reason: TEST_DB_DIR not set or directory does not exist

19. loco and inbred GWA have equal marker counts for same marker set (test-cross_validation.R:336:3) - Reason: TEST_DB_DIR not set or directory does not exist

20. marker counts in metadata match actual partition row counts (test-cross_validation.R:378:3) - Reason: TEST_DB_DIR not set or directory does not exist

21. query_mapping_direct() matches query_for_threshold_analysis() schema and content (test-cross_validation.R:406:3) - Reason: TEST_DB_DIR not set or directory does not exist

22. traits/causal_genotypes/ directory exists and contains parquet files (test-cv_pool.R:73:3) - Reason: TEST_CV_POOL=true not set — skipping cv_pool integration tests

23. causal genotype parquets have correct schema (test-cv_pool.R:87:3) - Reason: TEST_CV_POOL=true not set — skipping cv_pool integration tests

24. non-marker causal variants appear as FN rows with NA log10p in assessment (test-cv_pool.R:109:3) - Reason: TEST_CV_POOL=true not set — skipping cv_pool integration tests

25. non-marker FN rows have significant=NA (not FALSE) in assessment (test-cv_pool.R:126:3) - Reason: TEST_CV_POOL=true not set — skipping cv_pool integration tests

26. Simulated.QTL.VarExp is populated for non-marker FN rows (test-cv_pool.R:141:3) - Reason: TEST_CV_POOL=true not set — skipping cv_pool integration tests

27. non-marker causal variants appear in causal_variants/ but not in markers DB view (test-cv_pool.R:157:3) - Reason: TEST_CV_POOL=true not set — skipping cv_pool integration tests

28. designate_qtl() classifies non-marker rows correctly by Detected status (test-cv_pool.R:188:3) - Reason: TEST_CV_POOL=true not set — skipping cv_pool integration tests

29. calculate_simrep_performance() runs correctly on cv_pool assessment data (test-cv_pool.R:223:3) - Reason: TEST_CV_POOL=true not set — skipping cv_pool integration tests

30. database root directory exists and has expected subdirectories (test-db_structure.R:37:3) - Reason: TEST_DB_DIR not set or directory does not exist — skipping integration tests

31. marker set parquet files exist (test-db_structure.R:46:3) - Reason: TEST_DB_DIR not set or directory does not exist — skipping integration tests

32. mapping partitions exist in Hive-style structure (test-db_structure.R:66:3) - Reason: TEST_DB_DIR not set or directory does not exist — skipping integration tests

33. metadata files exist (test-db_structure.R:89:3) - Reason: TEST_DB_DIR not set or directory does not exist — skipping integration tests

34. marker_set_metadata has required columns and valid data (test-db_structure.R:100:3) - Reason: TEST_DB_DIR not set or directory does not exist — skipping integration tests

35. marker_set_metadata contains strainfile_hash and strain_list (test-db_structure.R:130:3) - Reason: TEST_DB_DIR not set or directory does not exist — skipping integration tests

36. marker set parquet has correct schema (test-db_structure.R:158:3) - Reason: TEST_DB_DIR not set or directory does not exist — skipping integration tests

37. mappings_metadata.parquet has required columns (test-db_structure.R:185:3) - Reason: TEST_DB_DIR not set or directory does not exist — skipping integration tests

38. hash_string columns are present in metadata files and absent from data files (test-db_structure.R:212:3) - Reason: TEST_DB_DIR not set or directory does not exist — skipping integration tests

39. mappings_metadata has correct row count (test-db_structure.R:236:3) - Reason: TEST_DB_DIR not set or directory does not exist — skipping integration tests

40. algorithm values are valid (test-db_structure.R:251:3) - Reason: TEST_DB_DIR not set or directory does not exist — skipping integration tests

41. PCA flags are correct (test-db_structure.R:269:3) - Reason: TEST_DB_DIR not set or directory does not exist — skipping integration tests

42. mapping IDs are 20-character lowercase hex hashes (test-db_structure.R:279:3) - Reason: TEST_DB_DIR not set or directory does not exist — skipping integration tests

43. database can be opened and queried via open_mapping_db() (test-db_structure.R:290:3) - Reason: TEST_DB_DIR not set or directory does not exist — skipping integration tests

44. db_stats() returns valid statistics (test-db_structure.R:305:3) - Reason: TEST_DB_DIR not set or directory does not exist — skipping integration tests

45. query_mapping_data() returns joined data with marker info (test-db_structure.R:317:3) - Reason: TEST_DB_DIR not set or directory does not exist — skipping integration tests

46. get_threshold_params() returns valid thresholds (test-db_structure.R:330:3) - Reason: TEST_DB_DIR not set or directory does not exist — skipping integration tests

47. all mapping partitions have non-empty data (test-db_structure.R:345:3) - Reason: TEST_DB_DIR not set or directory does not exist — skipping integration tests

48. P values are in valid range (0, 1] (test-db_structure.R:360:3) - Reason: TEST_DB_DIR not set or directory does not exist — skipping integration tests

49. traits directory exists with expected subdirectories (test-db_structure.R:381:3) - Reason: TEST_DB_DIR not set or directory does not exist — skipping integration tests

50. genotype matrix parquets have correct schema (test-db_structure.R:394:3) - Reason: TEST_DB_DIR not set or directory does not exist — skipping integration tests

51. trait metadata parquets have correct schema (test-db_structure.R:420:3) - Reason: TEST_DB_DIR not set or directory does not exist — skipping integration tests

52. phenotype parquets have correct schema and non-NA values (test-db_structure.R:445:3) - Reason: TEST_DB_DIR not set or directory does not exist — skipping integration tests

53. causal variant parquets have correct schema and QTL format (test-db_structure.R:463:3) - Reason: TEST_DB_DIR not set or directory does not exist — skipping integration tests

54. all expected populations appear in mappings_metadata and are queryable (test-db_structure.R:488:3) - Reason: TEST_DB_DIR not set or directory does not exist — skipping integration tests

55. inbred GWA marker count equals marker set size (test-db_structure.R:527:3) - Reason: TEST_DB_DIR not set or directory does not exist — skipping integration tests

56. loco GWA marker count equals marker set size (test-db_structure.R:553:3) - Reason: TEST_DB_DIR not set or directory does not exist — skipping integration tests

57. var.exp is absent or NA for inline-path mappings (test-db_structure.R:582:3) - Reason: TEST_DB_DIR not set or directory does not exist — skipping integration tests

```
:::

---

## 3. Integration Tests — Local

### 3. Fixed architecture (`test`) — regression

Verifies the common case (typically <15% significant markers with BF threshold) still works correctly.

```bash
export NXF_VER=24.10.5
bash tests/collect_test_data.sh --profile test

TEST_DB_DIR=tests/integration_data/test/db \
TEST_WORK_DIR=tests/integration_data/test/work \
TEST_LEGACY_ASSESSMENT=tests/integration_data/test/simulation_assessment_results.tsv \
TEST_DB_ASSESSMENT=tests/integration_data/test/db_simulation_assessment_results.tsv \
Rscript tests/run_tests.R
```

**Pass criterion:** all tests pass (`test-db_structure.R`, `test-cross_validation.R`, `test-assessment_cross_validation.R`).

::: {.callout-note collapse="true" title="Pipeline run output"}
``` text
Completed at: 27-Apr-2026 11:47:16
Duration    : 8m 12s
CPU hours   : 0.3
Succeeded   : 59


Collecting outputs from: /Users/ryanmckeown/Desktop/remove-n-sigmarkers-thresh/Analysis_Results-test
Collected 43 cross-validation files to: /Users/ryanmckeown/Desktop/remove-n-sigmarkers-thresh/tests/integration_data/test/work

Test data collected to: /Users/ryanmckeown/Desktop/remove-n-sigmarkers-thresh/tests/integration_data/test

Run integration tests with:

TEST_DB_DIR=/Users/ryanmckeown/Desktop/remove-n-sigmarkers-thresh/tests/integration_data/test/db \
TEST_WORK_DIR=/Users/ryanmckeown/Desktop/remove-n-sigmarkers-thresh/tests/integration_data/test/work \
TEST_LEGACY_ASSESSMENT=/Users/ryanmckeown/Desktop/remove-n-sigmarkers-thresh/tests/integration_data/test/simulation_assessment_results.tsv \
TEST_DB_ASSESSMENT=/Users/ryanmckeown/Desktop/remove-n-sigmarkers-thresh/tests/integration_data/test/db_simulation_assessment_results.tsv \
Rscript tests/run_tests.R
```
:::

::: {.callout-note collapse="true" title="Test suite output"}
``` text
analyze_mapping: ...................................................
assessment_cross_validation: ..........................
cross_validation: ........................................................
cv_pool: SSSSSSSS
db_structure: ..........................................................................................S...

══ Skipped ═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
1. traits/causal_genotypes/ directory exists and contains parquet files (test-cv_pool.R:73:3) - Reason: TEST_CV_POOL=true not set — skipping cv_pool integration tests

2. causal genotype parquets have correct schema (test-cv_pool.R:87:3) - Reason: TEST_CV_POOL=true not set — skipping cv_pool integration tests

3. non-marker causal variants appear as FN rows with NA log10p in assessment (test-cv_pool.R:109:3) - Reason: TEST_CV_POOL=true not set — skipping cv_pool integration tests

4. non-marker FN rows have significant=NA (not FALSE) in assessment (test-cv_pool.R:126:3) - Reason: TEST_CV_POOL=true not set — skipping cv_pool integration tests

5. Simulated.QTL.VarExp is populated for non-marker FN rows (test-cv_pool.R:141:3) - Reason: TEST_CV_POOL=true not set — skipping cv_pool integration tests

6. non-marker causal variants appear in causal_variants/ but not in markers DB view (test-cv_pool.R:157:3) - Reason: TEST_CV_POOL=true not set — skipping cv_pool integration tests

7. designate_qtl() classifies non-marker rows correctly by Detected status (test-cv_pool.R:188:3) - Reason: TEST_CV_POOL=true not set — skipping cv_pool integration tests

8. calculate_simrep_performance() runs correctly on cv_pool assessment data (test-cv_pool.R:223:3) - Reason: TEST_CV_POOL=true not set — skipping cv_pool integration tests

9. all expected populations appear in mappings_metadata and are queryable (test-db_structure.R:490:5) - Reason: TEST_EXPECTED_POPULATIONS not set — skipping multi-population assertions
```
:::

## Notes

<!-- Record any issues, unexpected behavior, or deviations from the standard workflow. -->
